meta.title: America's 2ND B-21 Raider is now flying
meta.description:
Huge thanks to Jarod Hamilton for the use of his B-21 footage!
Make sure to follow him on Twitter/X: https://x.com/JarodMHamilton

America now has two B-21 Raider stealth bombers conducting flight tests, with the second of these advanced new aircraft taking flight for the first time on Thursday afternoon.
